page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn8ia-m8.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores using the x86_64 architecture. The underlying processor is an AMD EPYC 9T34 running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. This configuration provides a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Graphics and parallel computing acceleration are provided by a single integrated NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPU with 8 GB of video memory. This server does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 7 Gbps. Given the dedicated AMD EPYC processor cores and the NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPU, this instance is designed for workloads requiring hardware acceleration, such as light machine learning inference, video transcoding, graphics rendering, and entry-level data science tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn8ia-m8.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor operating at 3.4 GHz, with 16 physical cores and a single thread per core. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Hardware acceleration is delivered via a single NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 7 Gbps. It is suitable for workloads requiring dedicated x86_64 compute resources and GPU acceleration, such as light machine learning inference, graphics rendering, and video processing.

64 GB of system memory with 4 GB per core
